overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a lush tropical coastline. The character walks along rocky shores, through dense jungle vegetation, wades through shallow turquoise water, and approaches a distant tribal settlement. The environment features dramatic lighting with atmospheric haze and a massive mechanical Tallneck visible in the background throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical riverbank with leaning palm tree

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline, glancing at the water and surrounding jungle

entered.detail: large leaning palm tree with curved trunk extending over the water
clear turquoise lagoon water with visible rocks beneath surface
rocky shoreline with various sized stones and pebbles
massive mechanical structure with long neck towering above the distant treeline

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit tropical riverbank with a prominent leaning palm tree on the right. The character walks along the rocky shore beside clear turquoise water, with a massive mechanical Tallneck visible in the distant haze. The environment is open and exposed with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path with red and green foliage

events.description: moves from open shoreline into dense jungle vegetation with tall trees

agents.ego_description: navigating through thick undergrowth and dense tropical vegetation

entered.detail: thick tropical plants with large red and green leaves
tall straight tree trunks forming a dense canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open shore into a narrow enclosed jungle path surrounded by dense vegetation. The lighting becomes diffused as the canopy closes overhead, and the ground changes to a dirt trail covered in red-leafed plants. The distant Tallneck shifts to the right as the camera moves forward through the trees.

events.description: steps from rocky shore into shallow turquoise water and begins wading

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep clear water, moving steadily toward the opposite shore

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow water revealing rocky bottom
rocks visible beneath the transparent water surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense jungle and enters a wide open lagoon, wading through shallow turquoise water. The ground surface transitions to water with visible submerged rocks, and the distant Tallneck becomes more prominent in the center of the frame as the character moves through the lagoon.

events.description: exits the water and steps onto rocky shore covered in coastal vegetation

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water and moving through dense coastal plants and mossy rocks

entered.detail: large boulders covered in green moss and tropical plants
dense ferns and tropical plants growing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The character exits the lagoon onto a rocky shore covered in mossy boulders and dense coastal vegetation. The environment becomes semi-covered as trees provide partial shade, and the ground returns to a dirt trail winding through ferns and tropical plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement approach with wooden structures

events.description: tribal settlement with wooden bridges and thatched structures comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a coastal settlement while moving through tropical vegetation

entered.detail: coastal village with wooden scaffolding and primitive architecture
elevated wooden walkway connecting settlement structures over water

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a tribal settlement ahead as the character moves through sparser vegetation. Wooden bridges and thatched structures become visible on the right, while the massive Tallneck remains visible in the distance to the left. The environment opens up again to full sky exposure as the approach to the settlement continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open riverbank through a dense jungle canopy and into a wide, shallow lagoon. It begins on a sunlit rocky shore beside clear turquoise water, where a massive mechanical Tallneck looms in the distant haze beneath an open sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow enclosed path where the lighting becomes diffused and the terrain turns into a dirt trail covered in red-leafed plants. The camera then emerges from the thick vegetation, transitioning from the shaded forest back into the bright light of a wide lagoon. Finally, the character wades through shallow turquoise water and submerged rocks as the distant Tallneck becomes more prominent in the center of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded rocky shoreline into the open approach of a tribal settlement. It begins as the character exits a lagoon onto a coast of mossy boulders and dense vegetation, where the lighting softens under the partial shade of overhanging trees. As the path transitions into a dirt trail winding through ferns and tropical plants, the canopy gradually thins to reveal a more open landscape. The scene then expands to show wooden bridges and thatched structures appearing on the right, while the massive Tallneck remains a constant landmark in the distance to the left. Finally, the vegetation becomes sparse as the camera moves into full sky exposure, completing the approach toward the settlement.
